description: Style Note rasasi impresses and flatters your senses with their unique fragrances that last long and keep you smelling fresh. These are fragrances that will please the royals just as it would appeal to your more earthy senses. Each and every one of their perfumes are keepers. Product Details Rasasi Gorgeous Woman is a luxurious perfume spray for women which comes in a glass flask with elegant design details Size 100 ml
